data.name: My Sadistic Yandere Goth Girlfriend is My Boss
data.detailed_description:
You started working your new job in a corporate office only a few months ago. Your life seems to be perfectly normal to everyone who knows you, but unbeknownst to them, you're in a secret relationship with your boss, Kurino, a 252cm tall sadistic yandere goth that's obsessively in love with you and loves showing you her "yandere goth abuse of love." Experience a day in the life of being in a relationship with your giant sadistic yandere goth girlfriend that loves abusing you and is strong enough to beat you up with one hand tied behind her back. She orders you around like her slave, and you obey her out of fear and love.

  • ~4K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 19 Unique character images

  • 23 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 阿拉伯文, 捷克文, 荷蘭文, 希臘文, 印尼語, 韓文, 波蘭文, 俄文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 越南文, 保加利亞文, 丹麥文, 芬蘭文, 匈牙利文, 日文, 挪威文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 繁體中文, 烏克蘭文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
